reviews.comment:
Es una excelente estación de servicio. Una de las pocas de la zona y parada obligatoria en la ruta 23.

Los baños estaban limpios. Los playeros unos chicos muy amables. La estación no es muy grande pero es práctica y funcional.

(Translated by Google)
It's an excellent gas station. One of the few in the area and a must-stop on Route 23.

The restrooms were clean. The attendants were very friendly. The station isn't very big, but it's practical and functional.

Excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Parada casi obligada del camino de San Antonio Oeste a Bariloche. Muy buena atención y opciones de comida para seguir viaje. Recomiendo los sandwiches de milanesa, una bomba !

(Translated by Google)
A near-must-stop on the road from San Antonio Oeste to Bariloche. Excellent service and great food options to fuel your trip. I highly recommend the milanesa sandwiches—they're amazing!

reviews.comment:
hasta las palomas la eligen por la buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Even the pigeons choose it because of the good service.

Excellent service from Mrs. Mariela
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s0MVpWUkVlWEY1WVROa1UyaFpTVVJ1YkRKRmFYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicios más, debería ser full completa no solo caféteria, cada vez que paso no tienen nada caliente para almorzar o cenar, todo frío al igual que muy poca variedad de galletitas y snacks. Es una parada obligada ya que luego son varios kilómetros hasta una nueva estación de servicios full completa. Podrían tomarlo en cuenta

(Translated by Google)
It's just another gas station; it should be a full-service station, not just a café. Every time I pass by, they don't have anything hot for lunch or dinner, everything is cold, and there's very little variety in cookies and snacks. It's a necessary stop since it's several kilometers to the next full-service station. They should take this into consideration.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214eVpFdFhXRE42WVRrNVVESnJhemwzYVdWdGFIYxAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente mí experiencia no fue buena. Me pareció que me quisieron cobrar carísimo las cosas del full y había fila para cargar nafta para que luego de esperar más de media hora me dijeran que no había nafta.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, my experience wasn't good. I felt they tried to overcharge me for the full options, and there was a line to fill up with gas, only to be told after waiting for more than half an hour that they were out of gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oUmJFdHNiMEpZZW5ocmRFdGxWakZRTTNNMVZWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy recomendable, el playero un tipazo, nos salvo! Nos recomendó un mecánico excelente! Muchas gracias!

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended! The gas station attendant was a great guy, he saved us! He recommended an excellent mechanic! Thank you so much!
